ogTitle: Margaret River vs Mariginiup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Margaret River and Mariginiup.
heading: Margaret River vs Mariginiup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Margaret River, Western Australia and Mariginiup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Margaret River has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mariginiup (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Margaret River or Mariginiup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Margaret River has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Mariginiup scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Margaret River scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Mariginiup scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Margaret River or Mariginiup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Margaret River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
